node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"զխոնարհու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104239878","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104239878","n":"13"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-060b"},"n":"զխոնարհութի"},"M1722":{"lit":"զխոնարհու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z103930793","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103930793","n":"6"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"1722.0137"},"n":"զխոնարհութի"},"M1887":{"lit":"զխոնարհ<lb xml:id=\"l104413299\" facs=\"#z104413299\" n=\"11\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104413298","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104413298","n":"10"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"1887.0343"},"n":"զխոնարհութի"},"M6712":{"lit":"զ<lb xml:id=\"l104393211\" facs=\"#z104393211\" n=\"4\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>խոնարհու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104393210","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104393210","n":"3"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-138b"},"n":"զխոնարհութի"},"M7227":{"lit":"զխոնարհու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z103964932","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103964932","n":"18"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7227-064b"},"n":"զխոնարհութի"}}
